4.note: Though you soar aloft like the eagle, though your nest is set among the stars, from there I will bring you down — YHWH's judgment of Edom's pride; Mary's Magnificat: he has brought down the mighty from their thrones; the pride-and-fall pattern of Obadiah is the structure of divine reversal that the Magnificat celebrates

15.note: The day of the LORD is near upon all the nations. As you have done it shall be done to you — the lex talionis principle applied to the Day of the LORD; the great city was split and the nations drank from the cup of YHWH's wrath; Obadiah's principle of nations receiving what they did to Israel reaches its ultimate form in Revelation's final judgment
